articles.title: Putin denounces Nato at scaled-back Victory Day parade
articles.summary: The Russian leader used his annual speech to justify his so-called special military operation in Ukraine.

articles.title: Iran accuses US of 'reckless military adventure'

articles.title: Japanese council votes to remove unconscious mayor

articles.title: UK warship HMS Dragon heads to Middle East for potential Strait of Hormuz mission
articles.summary: The Ministry of Defence says the ship will prepare to join an international mission to safeguard shipping, but only when fighting in the region ends.
